acquisition method: Targeted siRNA screen identified LUBAC as mitotic regulator
enrichment method: recombinant protein containing one copy of the UBAN region from human NEMO (residues 257-346) fused to Glutatione-Stransferase (GST) was used
fragmentation method: analyzed by an ultra-performance LC-MS/MS platform of Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
instrument: analyzed by an ultra-performance LC-MS/MS platform of Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
